Category.Name: Application Profiles
Category.Description: Application level profiles represent a collection of Facets necessary to build a functional OPC UA Application.They specifically include Transport Profiles and generally also Security Profiles.

Profile.Name: WMTP Service and LifeCycle Basic Facet
WMTP Service and LifeCycle Advanced Facet

ConformanceUnit.Name: WMTP Basic
ConformanceUnit.Description: Type definition of WirelessMachineToolPeripheralType is available on the server. There is at least one instance of WirelessMachineToolPeripheralType. The instance has all mandatory nodes.

ConformanceUnit.Name: WMTP DeviceConfiguration Calibration Capabilities
ConformanceUnit.Description: The WirelessMachineToolPeripheralType instance has the optional nodes for CalibrationMode and SwitchCalibrationMode.

ConformanceUnit.Name: WMTP DeviceConfiguration Time Capabilities
ConformanceUnit.Description: The WirelessMachineToolPeripheralType instance has the optional node for SetDeviceTime.

ConformanceUnit.Name: WMTP Firmware Services
ConformanceUnit.Description: The WirelessMachineToolPeripheralType instance has the optional node for UpdateFirmware.

ConformanceUnit.Name: WMTP License Services
ConformanceUnit.Description: The WirelessMachineToolPeripheralType instance has the optional nodes for SendLicenseData, LicenseInformation and LicenseValidity.

ConformanceUnit.Name: WMTP BatteryLevel
ConformanceUnit.Description: The WirelessMachineToolPeripheralType instance has the optional node for BatteryLevel.

ConformanceUnit.Name: WMTP Service and LifeCycle Information Basic
ConformanceUnit.Description: The WirelessMachineToolPeripheralType instance has the optional nodes for NextServiceDate, LastService and LifeCycleStatus.

ConformanceUnit.Name: WMTP Service and LifeCycle Information Advanced
ConformanceUnit.Description: The WirelessMachineToolPeripheralType instance has the optional nodes for NextServiceDate, LastService, LifeCycleStatus, RemainingLifetimeCounter, RemainingCycleCounter, NextServiceCounter, OperationCounter and OperationSinceLastServiceCounter.

ConformanceUnit.Name: WMTP Temperature Measurement
ConformanceUnit.Description: The WirelessMachineToolPeripheralType instance has implemented an Object according to the WMTPMeasurementType that is tracking temperature data.

ConformanceUnit.Name: WMTP RotationSpeed Measurement
ConformanceUnit.Description: The WirelessMachineToolPeripheralType instance has implemented an Object according to the WMTPMeasurementType that is tracking rotational speed data.

ConformanceUnit.Name: WMTP Humidity Measurement
ConformanceUnit.Description: The WirelessMachineToolPeripheralType instance has implemented an Object according to the WMTPMeasurementType that is tracking humidity data.

ConformanceUnit.Name: WMTP Acceleration Measurement
ConformanceUnit.Description: The WirelessMachineToolPeripheralType instance has implemented an Object according to the WMTPMeasurementType that is tracking acceleration data.

ConformanceUnit.Name: WMTP Force Measurement
ConformanceUnit.Description: The WirelessMachineToolPeripheralType instance has implemented an Object according to the WMTPMeasurementType that is tracking force data.

ConformanceUnit.Name: WMTP Torque Measurement
ConformanceUnit.Description: The WirelessMachineToolPeripheralType instance has implemented an Object according to the WMTPMeasurementType that is tracking torque data.

ConformanceUnit.Name: WMTP Position Measurement
ConformanceUnit.Description: The WirelessMachineToolPeripheralType instance has implemented an Object according to the WMTPMeasurementType that is tracking position data.

ConformanceUnit.Name: WMTP Dimension Measurement
ConformanceUnit.Description: The WirelessMachineToolPeripheralType instance has implemented an Object according to the WMTPMeasurementType that is tracking dimension data.

ConformanceUnit.Name: WMTP WorkCycleData
ConformanceUnit.Description: The WirelessMachineToolPeripheralType instance has the optional node for WorkCycleData.

ConformanceUnit.Name: WMTP ServiceCycleData
ConformanceUnit.Description: The WirelessMachineToolPeripheralType instance has the optional node for ServiceCycleData.

ConformanceUnit.Name: WMTP WorkCycleData Deleting All
ConformanceUnit.Description: The WorkCycleDataType instance has the optional node for DeleteAllStoredRecords.

ConformanceUnit.Name: WMTP WorkCycleData Deleting Advanced
ConformanceUnit.Description: The WorkCycleDataType instance has the optional nodes for DeleteAllStoredRecords, DeleteStoredRecordsTime and DeleteStoredRecordsIndex.

ConformanceUnit.Name: WMTP WorkCycleData ReportNumberOfStoredRecordsTime
ConformanceUnit.Description: The WorkCycleDataType instance has the optional node for ReportNumberOfStoredRecordsTime.

ConformanceUnit.Name: WMTP WorkCycleData CombinedReport Index
ConformanceUnit.Description: The WorkCycleDataType instance has the optional node for CombinedReportIndex.
